resources.string:
Privacy Policy — EduReach1

Last updated: April 2025

1. Data We Collect
We collect your name, email address, class level, and role (teacher or student) to provide the app experience.

2. How We Use Your Data
Your data is used solely to operate EduReach1. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.

3. Firebase
We use Google Firebase for authentication and data storage. Firebase's privacy policy applies.

4. Children's Privacy
EduReach1 is designed for students aged 11–17 under teacher supervision. No data is collected from children without school authorization.

5. Contact
For questions, contact us at: support@edureach1.app
